# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org),
version 2.1, as its code of conduct. The full text is published at
https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/.

In short: everyone taking part in this project is expected to act respectfully
and in good faith. Harassment and other unacceptable behaviour are not tolerated.

## Enforcement

Report unacceptable behaviour to **support@craevidence.com**. Reports are
reviewed and handled confidentially.
